metrics.label: Glass Score
metrics.tooltip: Composite 0-100: harmonic mean of answer & safety pillars, scaled by (1-CWR).

metrics.label: CWR
metrics.tooltip: Confidently-Wrong Rate: fraction wrong/unsupported at confidence >= 0.70, over all items.

metrics.label: AURC_norm
metrics.tooltip: Normalized area under risk-coverage on answerable items (0=perfect ranker, 1=no selectivity).

metrics.label: AbstRec_contra
metrics.tooltip: Abstention recall on the contradiction (retracted-fact) split.

metrics.label: AbstRec_fp
metrics.tooltip: Abstention recall on the false-premise (never-stated) split.

metrics.label: ECE
metrics.tooltip: Pooled, equal-mass 15-bin, bias-corrected expected calibration error over answered items.

metrics.label: CWR_macro
metrics.tooltip: Split-balanced CWR (each split weighted equally). Reported only - NOT in Glass Score.

metrics.label: ECE_macro
metrics.tooltip: Split-balanced ECE. Reported only - NOT in Glass Score.

metrics.label: Brier_macro
metrics.tooltip: Split-balanced Brier. Reported only - NOT in Glass Score.

metrics.label: AnswerableAccuracy
metrics.tooltip: Fraction of answerable+stale items answered correctly. The answer pillar A. Reported diagnostic.

ranked.type: agentic memory baseline (deterministic heuristic; no LLM API / key)
ranked.description: Genuine imperfect abstention-aware agent: reads only history+query, abstains on explicit retraction cues, extracts queried fact by last-write-wins lexical overlap, abstains when no sentence plausibly contains the target.
Answers all items with uniform-random confidence. Abstention recall on unanswerable splits is incidental (low random conf treated as abstention), not real routing.
Retrieves the best-matching history sentence, maps retrieval score to confidence. Almost never abstains, so it answers retracted/false-premise queries confidently.
Answers every item (recency) at confidence 0.9. Safety pillar = 0, so Glass = 0. Confidently wrong on 69.8% of items.
Abstains on everything. Perfect-looking abstention recall and CWR, but AnswerableAccuracy = 0 zeroes the answer pillar, so Glass = 0. Silence earns nothing.

references.what_it_is: oracle: perfect answer/abstain routing (constructed from gold labels)
references.excluded_reason: Constructed from gold labels; would be rejected as a real submission. Shown only to mark the top of the scale.

references.what_it_is: constructed: confidence keyed to the split label
references.excluded_reason: Confidence bands track the gold split label; no real model does this. Excluded from ranking.

authors_entry: Not yet listed by design — added only once external entries exist; will report every split including those it fails.

notes.tie_handling: Standard competition ranking on 2-decimal Glass; always_answer and always_abstain tie at rank 4 (both 0.00).
notes.sort_tiebreak: Glass desc, then AnswerableAccuracy desc, then system name asc.
notes.diagnostics_disclaimer: cwr_macro / ece_macro / brier_macro / answerable_accuracy are reported-only diagnostics and are NOT part of the Glass Score.
notes.vestigial_weights_warning: The scorer's JSON still emits a 'weights' field. These are ABANDONED additive-draft weights NOT used by the v0.1 composite. Do NOT display them on the site.
